'''Jungle Potion''' is a short quest taking place on [[Karamja]]. It involves gathering a handful of different [[herbs]] for [[Trufitus|Trufitus Shakaya]], in order for him to perform a ritual to communicate with the island's gods.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to [[Trufitus]] at [[Tai Bwo Wannai]].
|startmap = 2810,3086
|difficulty = Novice
|description = [[Trufitus Shakaya]] of the [[Tai Bwo Wannai Village]] requires that you collect five special jungle herbs for a potion so he can commune with his Gods.
|length = Short
|requirements = * Completion of [[Druidic Ritual]]
* {{SCP|Herblore|3|link=yes}} {{Boostable|yes}} {{Questreqstart|no}}
* The ability to defend against level 53 [[Jogre]]s and level 46 [[Harpie Bug Swarm]]s.
|items = 
|recommended = * {{SCP|Combat|20|link=yes}}
* 1-2 [[antidote++]] or other [[antipoison]] potions
* [[Food]]
* [[Stamina potion]]s
* [[Combat equipment]] to kill a level 53 [[Jogre]] for an easy [[Karamja Diary]] task
* Fast travel to [[Tai Bwo Wannai Village]] to start the quest - [[Brimhaven teleport]], [[Teleport to House]] (Brimhaven), [[Captain Barnaby]]'s ship from [[Ardougne]] to Brimhaven, [[fairy ring]] {{fairycode|ckr}} or [[amulet of glory]] to [[Karamja]]
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Karamja}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
</poem>
}}

===An abandoned village===
[[File:Trufitus chathead.png|left|frameless]]
Head to the small village of [[Tai Bwo Wannai]], located south of [[Brimhaven]] on [[Karamja]]. Talk to [[Trufitus]], found in a small house north-east of the main village area, and ask him where everyone is. He will explain they are afraid to stay in the village. Ask him how you can help, and he will ask for several [[herb]]s to mix a [[potions|potion]] to commune with the Gods, in order to see what fate befalls them.

:'''Note:''' You cannot collect all of the herbs at once. You will need to go back to talk with Trufitus each time.
{{Clear|left}}
<gallery mode="packed" widths="180px" heights="180px">
Jungle Potion - Snake weed.png | Location of the snake weed.
Jungle Potion - Ardrigal.png | Location of the ardrigal.
Jungle Potion - Sito foil.png | Location of the sito foil.

Jungle Potion - Rogue's purse.png | Location of the Rogue's purse.
</gallery>

===Snake Weed===
Head south-west of the village near the ocean to find [[marshy jungle vine]]. Search it to get a [[grimy snake weed]]; this may take 1-5 minutes depending on your [[Herblore]] level. Clean the herb and give it to [[Trufitus]].

:'''Note''': If you intend to do [[Legends' Quest]] and [[Zogre Flesh Eaters]], take two extra to save yourself time later.

===Ardrigal===
Head north-east of [[Trufitus]]' hut until you reach a peninsula with several [[palm tree (Ardrigal)|palm trees]] on it, just south of the [[Shortcuts|agility shortcut]].

Avoiding the nearby level 46 [[Harpie Bug Swarm]]s, search a palm tree to find a [[grimy ardrigal]]. Clean the herb and give it to [[Trufitus]].

:'''Note:''' If you intend to do [[Legends' Quest]], take 2-3 extra to save yourself time later (3 are needed for the long path).

===Sito Foil===
{{Color|red|Warning:}} The [[tribesmen]] in this section are aggressive, and can poison you with damage starting at 11.

Immediately south of the village you will find [[scorched earth]]. Search it to find the [[grimy sito foil]]. Clean the herb and give it to [[Trufitus]].

===Volencia Moss===

Head south-east of the hut until you reach a group of [[rock (volencia moss)|rocks]] you can search that are in the mining area, search an empty one to find the [[grimy volencia moss]]. Clean the herb and give it to [[Trufitus]].

:'''Note''': If you intend to do [[Fairytale I - Growing Pains]] take an extra to save yourself time later.

===Rogue's Purse===
{{Needed|recommended=Food for low levels to run aggressive level 53 Jogres, and combat equipment to kill a level 53 [[Jogre]] for an easy Diary task}}
[[File:Jogre.png|80px|left|frameless]]
[[File:Jungle Potion - Jogre Cave.png|thumb|right|220px|The Jogre cave entrance.]]
Head north-east of the village towards where you found the Ardrigal. Once you find the end of the cliffs, follow the coastline west until you find a [[rocks (Pothole Dungeon)|pile of searchable rocks]]. Search them and enter the cave.

:'''Note:''' You may kill a [[Jogre]] inside the dungeon for an easy [[Karamja Diary]] task. Take the [[jogre bones]] for [[ Tai Bwo Wannai Trio]]. Although they may drop the grimy [[rogue's purse]], they do not count for the quest.

Run south past the [[aggressive]] level 53 [[Jogre]]s until you find a [[fungus covered cavern wall]]. Search it until you find the grimy rogue's purse (may take some minutes). 

:'''Note''': If you intend to do [[Zogre Flesh Eaters]], take an extra to save yourself time later.

Return to Trufitus with the final cleaned herb.

'''Congratulations, quest complete!'''
{{Clear}}

==Required for completing==
Completion of Jungle Potion is required for the following:
*[[My Arm's Big Adventure]] - To work in the [[Tai Bwo Wannai Cleanup]] [[minigame]] during the quest
*[[Shilo Village]]
*[[Tai Bwo Wannai Trio]]
*[[Zogre Flesh Eaters]]
*Several tasks in the [[Karamja Diary]]
*[[Fairytale I - Growing Pains]] (For [[Ironman mode|ironmen]] asked to obtain Proboscis or Volencia moss)
